user_prompt:
User goal:
Got an image upload at /uploads/raw/photo_8821.jpg. Resize it for web
(max 1200px wide), make a thumbnail (200px square), pull out the EXIF data,
then upload both the resized version and the thumbnail to our CDN. Give me
back the URLs.


Available tools:
- resize_image(src: string, max_width: integer) — Resize image to max width. Returns path to resized file.
- make_thumbnail(src: string, size: integer) — Create a square thumbnail. Returns path to thumbnail file.
- extract_exif(src: string) — Pull EXIF metadata from an image.
- upload_to_cdn(path: string) — Upload a file to the CDN. Returns the public URL.

Produce the plan now.
